title: Castle Map — Explore 3,691 Castles, Fortresses & Palaces Worldwide
excerpt: A free interactive map of 3,691 great castles, fortresses and palaces across 131 countries — each pinned with its photo, founding century and story.
content_html:
The interactive map of the world's castles & fortresses

Castlemap is a free interactive map of 3,691 of the world's greatest castles, fortresses and palaces across 131 countries. Pan and zoom the night map above, click any point for a photo and quick facts, or open a landmark's page for its full story and exact location. From medieval strongholds and hilltop citadels to grand royal palaces, it is the most complete castle map online.

Browse by type

Castles by country

Find castles and fortresses in the countries that have the most:

  • Italy 288
  • France 276
  • Germany 254
  • Spain 180
  • Poland 163
  • Japan 155
  • England 153
  • Czech Republic 132
  • Austria 131
  • India 101
  • Slovakia 99
  • Switzerland 91
  • Scotland 88
  • Greece 87
  • Sweden 85
  • Portugal 82
  • Netherlands 76
  • Romania 74
  • Russia 66
  • Hungary 64

Browse all 131 countries on the map →

Famous castles to start with

The most-covered castles on Earth, by number of Wikipedia language editions:

  • Palace of Versailles France
  • Forbidden City China
  • Château de Montsoreau France
  • Acropolis of Athens Greece
  • Kremlin Russia
  • Alhambra Spain
  • Buckingham Palace England
  • Neuschwanstein Castle Germany
  • Tower of London England
  • Bastille France
  • Windsor Castle England
  • Fatehpur Sikri India

The most famous castles in the world, ranked →  ·  Browse all 3,691 castles & fortresses →

How this map is built

Castlemap is built entirely from open data: facts, founding dates and coordinates from Wikidata, photographs from Wikimedia Commons, stories from Wikipedia, and the night basemap from OpenFreeMap and Natural Earth. Rather than plotting every fortification on Earth, the atlas curates the 3,691 most significant castles, fortresses and palaces — each verified to have a real photo, a Wikipedia article and exact coordinates — balanced across 131 countries so the map stays explorable. The atlas reads a dozen Wikipedia language editions beyond English, so a Burg documented only in German or a castello only in Italian can still make the map.

Missing a castle you know? The map refreshes from Wikidata, so the best way to add one is to improve its Wikidata entry: exact coordinates, a Commons photo and a Wikipedia article in any major language make it eligible for the next refresh. Edits to the commons improve every atlas built on them — not just this one.

The full curated dataset is free: download all 3,691 castles as GeoJSON or CSV (CC0). Curious how it breaks down? See the castle statistics — which country has the most castles, who leads per capita, and when the world built them.

Frequently asked questions

What is Castlemap?

Castlemap is a free interactive map of 3,691 of the world's great castles, fortresses and palaces across 131 countries. Every landmark is plotted on the map and has its own page with a photo, founding century, story and coordinates.

How many castles are on the map?

3,691 landmarks in total — 1,706 castles, 543 fortresses, 760 palaces and 682 ruins — across 131 countries.

Which country has the most castles?

In the Castlemap atlas, Italy has the most with 288, followed by France, Germany, Spain, Poland. You can browse castles in any of 131 countries.

Is Castlemap free to use?

Yes — Castlemap is completely free and needs no account. Open the map and start exploring the world's castles right away.

Where does the castle data come from?

Castle facts and coordinates come from Wikidata, photos from Wikimedia Commons, and the basemap from OpenFreeMap and Natural Earth — all open data.

How are the castles ranked by fame?

Each castle carries a fame score: the number of Wikipedia language editions — plus a few sister projects — that cover it, taken from its Wikidata sitelink count, a well-established proxy for global renown. The Palace of Versailles ranks #1. You can see all 3,691 castles ranked by fame, with the method and its limits explained in full.

Why isn't a castle I know on the map?

Castlemap is curated rather than exhaustive. Europe alone has tens of thousands of castle sites — many towns and hilltops have one — so the atlas maps the 3,691 most significant worldwide: those with a documented story, a real photo and exact coordinates, balanced across countries so the map stays explorable.

Can I add a castle to the map?

Yes — through open data. Castlemap refreshes from Wikidata, so to get a castle added, improve its Wikidata entry with exact coordinates, a Wikimedia Commons photo and a Wikipedia article — English or any of the dozen major language editions the atlas reads. Well-documented castles become eligible for the next data refresh, and your edit improves every map built on open data.

Explore all 3,691 castles & fortresses →

More atlases: TrainRouter · Sunshine Atlas · Beachmap

content_html_zh:
世界城堡和要塞的互动地图

Castlemap 是一张免费的交互式地图，包含 131 个国家/地区的 3,691 座世界上最伟大的城堡、要塞和宫殿。 平移和缩放上面的夜间地图，单击任意点查看照片和简要信息，或者打开地标页面了解其完整故事和确切位置。 从中世纪的要塞和山顶城堡到宏伟的皇家宫殿，它是最完整的在线城堡地图。

按类型浏览

各个国家的城堡

查找拥有最多城堡和要塞的国家：

  • Italy 288
  • 法国 276
  • 德国254
  • Spain 180
  • 波兰163
  • Japan 155
  • 英格兰 153
  • 捷克共和国 132
  • 奥地利 131
  • India 101
  • 斯洛伐克99
  • 瑞士 91
  • 苏格兰 88
  • 希腊87
  • 瑞典85
  • 葡萄牙 82
  • 荷兰 76
  • 罗马尼亚 74
  • 俄罗斯 66
  • 匈牙利 64

浏览地图上所有 131 个国家 →

从著名的城堡开始

地球上覆盖最多的城堡（按维基百科语言版本数量划分）：

  • 法国凡尔赛宫
  • 紫禁城中国
  • 蒙索罗城堡 法国
  • 希腊雅典卫城
  • 俄罗斯克里姆林宫
  • 西班牙阿罕布拉
  • 白金汉宫 英国
  • 德国新天鹅​​堡
  • 英国伦敦塔
  • 巴士底狱 法国
  • 英格兰温莎城堡
  • 法塔赫布尔西格里 印度

世界上最著名的城堡排名 → · 浏览全部 3,691 座城堡和要塞 →

这张地图是如何构建的

Castlemap 完全根据开放数据构建：来自 Wikidata 的事实、创建日期和坐标、来自 Wikimedia Commons 的照片、来自 Wikipedia 的故事以及来自 OpenFreeMap 和 Natural Earth 的夜间底图。 该地图集没有绘制地球上的每一个防御工事，而是策划了 3,691 个最重要的城堡、要塞和宫殿——每一个都经过验证有一张真实照片、一篇维基百科文章和准确坐标——平衡分布在 131 个国家/地区，因此地图保持可探索性。 该地图集读取了英语以外的十几种维基百科语言版本，因此仅用德语记录的城堡或仅用意大利语记录的城堡仍然可以制作地图。

缺少一座城堡你知道吗？ 该地图从维基数据刷新，因此添加地图的最佳方法是改进其维基数据条目：精确坐标、共享照片和任何主要语言的维基百科文章使其有资格进行下一次刷新。 对公共资源的编辑改进了基于其构建的每一个地图集——而不仅仅是这个。

完整的精选数据集是免费的：以 GeoJSON 或 CSV (CC0) 格式下载所有 3,691 座城堡。 好奇它是如何分解的？ 查看城堡统计数据 - 哪个国家拥有最多的城堡、人均城堡数量领先以及世界建造城堡的时间。

常见问题

What is Castlemap?

Castlemap 是一张免费的交互式地图，包含 131 个国家/地区的 3,691 座世界上最伟大的城堡、要塞和宫殿。 每个地标都标在地图上，并有自己的页面，其中包含照片、建国世纪、故事和坐标。

How many castles are on the map?

共有 3,691 个地标建筑，其中包括 1,706 座城堡、543 座堡垒、760 座宫殿和 682 处遗址，遍布 131 个国家/地区。

Which country has the most castles?

在 Castlemap 地图集中，意大利最多，有 288 个，其次是法国、德国、西班牙、波兰。 您可以浏览 131 个国家中任意一个国家的城堡。

Is Castlemap free to use?

是的 - Castlemap 完全免费，不需要帐户。 打开地图，立即开始探索世界各地的城堡。

Where does the castle data come from?

城堡的事实和坐标来自维基数据、来自维基共享资源的照片以及来自 OpenFreeMap 和 Natural Earth 的底图 — 所有都是开放数据。

How are the castles ranked by fame?

每一座城堡都有一个名气分数：覆盖它的维基百科语言版本的数量——加上一些姐妹项目——取自其维基数据附加链接计数，这是全球声誉的一个公认的代表。 凡尔赛宫排名第一。 您可以看到所有 3,691 座城堡按名气排名，并详细说明了排名方法及其限制。

Why isn't a castle I know on the map?

Castlemap 是精心策划的而不是详尽的。 仅欧洲就有数以万计的城堡遗址（许多城镇和山顶都有），因此该地图集绘制了全球 3,691 个最重要的城堡遗址：这些城堡遗址都有记录的故事、真实的照片和准确的坐标，在各个国家/地区之间保持平衡，以便地图保持可探索性。

Can I add a castle to the map?

是的——通过开放数据。 城堡地图从维基数据中刷新，因此要添加城堡，请使用精确坐标、维基共享资源照片和维基百科文章（英语或地图集读取的十几种主要语言版本中的任何一种）改进其维基数据条目。 记录齐全的城堡有资格进行下一次数据刷新，并且您的编辑改进了基于开放数据构建的每张地图。
